subject: grx014_cluster_store_real_pass_enablement_smoke
known_gaps: math parity is CPU-proven with an integer-exact reference for the complete store-segment math and still pending in-engine GPU observation (math_parity_evidence.json status=pending_gpu_dispatch); the cluster_render raster segment, the buffer clears, and the render_element_count == 0 early-out stay native permanently (resource_mapping.md scope)

canonical artifact provenance is hlsl_bridge_workaround (owner-approved): cluster_store is an all structured-buffer / SSBO pass, so the GRX-009 texture-intrinsic llc blocker does NOT apply; the workaround is used because the Rurix lang subset has no aggregate SSBO element types

the real dispatch path is linked only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature; the shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, and the patch 0025 result writeback is a SCAFFOLD: the shim submit executes outside Godot's frame command order and the native Godot cluster store re-packs the whole cluster table every frame as the continuation/backstop
note: GRX-014 cluster_store gated real-pass enablement gate evidence. The opt-in real-pass arm (dispatch_real_pass, default false) runs against the owner-approved hlsl_bridge workaround canonical package (three structured buffers: cluster_render SRV t0 + render_elements SRV t1 inputs, cluster_store UAV u0 output; per-slot structured_buffer/structured_buffer/rwstructured_buffer binding kinds; complete store-segment math parity CPU-proven integer-exact pending GPU) and a d3d12-recording-shim bridge DLL, so every software gate can pass and a real recorded dispatch may return RXGD_STATUS_OK; when the dispatch cannot complete the gate reports first_missing_prerequisite=real_dispatch_recording_failed instead of claiming success. The patch 0025 result writeback is a SCAFFOLD (native Godot cluster store stays the continuation/backstop), default_enable_state stays disabled, and no performance, FPS, or GPU-timestamp claim is made.

dll_fingerprint.feature_note: Bridge built WITH the d3d12-recording-shim feature: the cluster_store real-pass arm routes through the linked recording shim, so arming RXGD_CAP_CLUSTER_STORE_REAL_PASS can make rxgd_record_pass return RXGD_STATUS_OK only after a real recorded dispatch. The shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked. target/debug/rurix_godot.dll is a mutable build artifact.

godot_exe_fingerprint.scratch_build_note: Scratch Godot build binaries are NOT committed to the repo. This console exe is a local, gitignored artifact rebuilt from the ignored external/godot-master snapshot with the full 0001..0026 patch stack applied (module_rurix_accel_enabled=yes d3d12=yes). Only its fingerprint is recorded here so the measured evidence stays auditable; re-point RURIX_GRX014_CLUSTER_STORE_GODOT_EXE at an equivalent rebuild to reproduce it.

build.command: H:\rurix\target\grx\scons-venv\Scripts\python.exe -m SCons platform=windows target=template_debug d3d12=yes module_rurix_accel_enabled=yes disable_path_overrides=no num_jobs=1 verbose=yes angle=no silence_msvc=no

forced_capability_downgrade.bridge_fallback_marker_line: RurixAccel: cluster_store native resource handle mapping fallback rc=1; Godot native cluster store path remains active.

allowed_godot_errors.message: Could not load global script cache
allowed_godot_errors.rationale: Tolerated Godot global script cache shutdown/cache warning in the generated minimal smoke project; it does not indicate runtime bridge recording failure when the process exits 0 and recording checks pass.

visual.frame_artifact_note: Frame artifacts live in the local work dir and are hash-pinned here; they are committed under artifacts/visual/ ONLY on a strict status=success run.

fallback_telemetry.bridge_fallback_marker: RurixAccel: cluster_store native resource handle mapping fallback rc=

success_evidence_note: Historical measured success artifact for the GRX-014 cluster_store real-pass enablement gate. It is written ONLY on a strict status=success run (opt-in real dispatch executed AND completed AND the LDR visual gate stayed within thresholds AND every audit passed) and is never deleted or overwritten by a later SKIP/FAIL run. Even this success keeps default_enable_state=disabled and performance_claim=none.
